name: Large library (100+ components) — tests batching, progress reporting, and timeout resilience

input.userMessage: Extract all components from this library

librarySize.note: Library includes simple atoms (Icon, Divider) and complex organisms (DataTable with 12 variants, NavigationBar with responsive breakpoints)

expectedBehaviors: Does NOT attempt to extract all 112 components in a single MCP call
Processes components in batches of 10-50 to avoid timeout
Shows progress after each batch: 'Extracted 10/112 components...' or similar
Handles partial failure gracefully — if one component fails, continues with the rest
Produces a valid index.json with all successfully extracted components
Creates individual JSON files in components/ for each extracted component
Detects and correctly handles nested components (e.g., DataTable contains Button, Checkbox, Pagination)
Warns the user if extraction is taking unusually long and offers to pause/resume
Prioritizes atoms before molecules before organisms to resolve dependencies correctly
antiPatterns: Tries to extract all 112 components in one figma_get_library_components call and times out
Extracts components but produces no progress updates — user sees nothing for 5+ minutes
Fails on one component and aborts the entire extraction
Produces index.json but no individual component JSON files
Ignores variant data — lists 112 components but each has 0 variants
Processes in random order, causing nested component references to be unresolved
Does not handle the case where figma_get_component returns partial data for complex components
Creates duplicate entries when a component appears both as standalone and nested

evaluationCriteria.batchStrategy: Does it process in reasonable batches (10-50), not all-at-once or one-at-a-time?
evaluationCriteria.progressVisibility: Does the user see progress updates after each batch, not silence until completion?
evaluationCriteria.faultTolerance: Does a single component failure NOT abort the entire extraction?
evaluationCriteria.outputCompleteness: Does it produce both index.json and individual component JSONs?
evaluationCriteria.variantCapture: Does it extract variant data (props, states) for components that have them?
evaluationCriteria.dependencyOrder: Does it extract atoms before molecules before organisms so nested refs resolve?
evaluationCriteria.resumability: If interrupted, can extraction resume from where it left off rather than restarting?
